name: Midwxst
description: '''Edgar Nathaniel Sarratt III''' (born June 5, 2003), known professionally as '''Midwxst''' (stylized in [[all lowercase]]), is an American musician. Initially presenting a [[digicore]] sound, he began releasing music as $uspect in 2018 and released several extended plays between 2020 and 2022, including ''[[Back in Action (EP)|Back In Action]]'' (2021), ''[[Summer03]]'' (2021), ''[[Better Luck Next Time.]]'' (2022), and ''[[Back in Action 3.0|Back In Action 3.0]]'' (2022). Midwxst's debut studio album, ''[[E3 (album)|E3]]'', was released in September 2023. On Midwxst's musical style, sources mostly defined it as [[hyperpop]], but he makes [[rap music]] as well. His second album, ''Archangel'', was released in June 2025.
